explanation: Escalated work outranks routine bands before within-tier urgency applies.
SLA class 3 outranks lower classes even with a lower urgency score than some routine rows.
Open duplicate review lifts the row ahead of otherwise similar routine work but does not bypass escalated or SLA-critical items.
Returned evidence uses returnLift and urgencyCarry to re-enter the queue without rewriting the lexicographic order.
Deficit round robin preserves visibility for low-intensity work while critical utilization remains below the overload guard.
Reviewer fit may change suggestion chips but not source ordinals.
When rho_crit >= rho_guard the queue enters overload_critical and starvation promises are suppressed.
